# LAB04 Evidence Folder

Put all proof artifacts for `docs/LAB04.md` here.

## Generated by script

Run from project root:

```bash
./scripts/lab04_evidence.sh terraform
./scripts/lab04_evidence.sh pulumi
IMPORT_REPO_ID=DevOps-Core-Course ./scripts/lab04_evidence.sh bonus
```

Generated files:

- `tf-init.txt`
- `tf-fmt.txt`
- `tf-validate.txt`
- `tf-plan.txt`
- `tf-apply.txt`
- `tf-output.txt`
- `tf-ssh-proof.txt`
- `pulumi-preview.txt`
- `pulumi-up.txt`
- `pulumi-output.txt`
- `pulumi-ssh-proof.txt`
- `gh-init.txt`
- `gh-validate.txt`
- `gh-import.txt`
- `gh-plan-after-import.txt`
- `gh-output.txt`

Cleanup proofs (optional, depending on your Lab 5 strategy):

- `tf-destroy.txt`
- `tf-docker-destroy.txt`
- `pulumi-destroy.txt`

## Screenshots to add manually

Save screenshots with stable names so links in `docs/LAB04.md` stay valid:

- `yc-vm-running.png`
- `yc-security-group.png`
- `yc-network-subnet.png`
- `yc-cleanup-status.png`
